news.title: At least 1 dead in I-85 crash; lanes shut down until further notice
news.summary: The Georgia Department of Transportation’s 511 camera shows the police activity investigating the crash near Senoia Road exit 61 in Fairburn.

news.title: Atlanta man’s attempt to outrun deputies ends with Taser, arrest
news.summary: An Atlanta man is facing multiple charges after deputies said he led them on a high-speed chase through south Georgia.

news.title: K9 unit captures wanted sex crimes fugitive in Riverdale
news.summary: A police drug unit and tracking K9 captured a wanted sex crimes fugitive who attempted to slip away through a back door during a targeted arrest in Riverdale.

news.title: DeKalb woman linked to $300K refund fraud scheme targeting TJ Maxx, HomeGoods and Marshalls
news.summary: A metro Atlanta woman is facing decades in prison after pleading no contest to racketeering, conspiracy to commit racketeering and fraud charges. The plea was made in the Twentieth Judicial Circuit in

news.title: Forsyth Sheriff's Office says 'heavy police presence' was for attempted robbery incident
news.summary: The Forsyth County Sheriff's Office and Johns Creek Police Department took a suspect into custody on Wednesday morning.

news.title: Big Tigger's estranged wife arrested on Maryland kidnapping warrants
news.summary: The estranged wife of Atlanta radio host Big Tigger was arrested Monday in northeast Georgia during a traffic stop on kidnapping charges out of Maryland.

news.title: Big Tigger’s wife arrested on kidnapping warrants during I-85 traffic stop
news.summary: An Atlanta radio host’s estranged wife, wanted on kidnapping-related warrants out of Maryland, was arrested Monday night, according to a Georgia’s sheriff’s office.

news.title: Woman dead, man injured during Cobb County shooting Tuesday night
news.summary: Police arrested a man Tuesday night after a domestic dispute escalated into a deadly shooting that left one woman dead and another man hospitalized.

news.title: Woman killed, man injured, suspect arrested after domestic violence shooting at Cobb County home: police
news.summary: Police responded to a home on Laurel Creek Trail near Smyrna around 7:55 p.m. and found a woman dead inside the home and a man shot outside the home.

news.title: Fourth of July family gathering turns into deadly gunfire in Clayton County
news.summary: A Fourth of July family gathering turned tragic when a man was shot and killed on Brenston Boulevard.

news.title: Jonesboro man sentenced to prison in Canton hotel assault
news.summary: A 37-year-old Jonesboro man will serve 10 years in prison after a knife attack on his partner inside a Canton hotel room.

news.title: Suspect arrested for rape possessed gun linked to Decatur murder, warrants reveal
news.summary: According to warrants, the suspect was arrested for rape, and during a search, officers found a gun on him, which connected him to the murder.

news.title: Arrest made in double shooting that killed man and 13-year-old boy in DeKalb County
news.summary: Authorities said shots were fired at a home on Rockcliff Road on July 2.

news.title: 14 teens, 1 adult arrested linked to Urban Air burglary social media trend in Gwinnett County, police say
news.summary: Police said the trend encourages teens and young adults to enter the business unlawfully after hours to use arcade games, attractions and damage property.

news.title: Police release photos of man wanted for shooting that injured 3 in Atlanta
news.summary: ​The three victims were alert, breathing, and conscious before being transported to Grady Hospital for treatment.

news.title: Man arrested after allegedly shooting up Downtown Athens businesses
news.summary: Police in Athens said Tuesday that a 19-year-old man was arrested after allegedly firing in the area of 246 East Clayton Street.

news.title: Douglasville Police search for suspect accused of indecent exposure along Chapel Hill Road
news.summary: One of the incidents happened on June 13 at a Target on Chapel Hill Road.

news.title: Witnesses said gunfire was 'very common' from house where men were arrested after DeKalb DA's Office employee was hurt by celebratory shots
news.summary: Lakesha Davis, who works in the DeKalb County District Attorney's Office, was critically injured by celebratory gunfire on the Fourth of July.
